overview: A functional medicine clinic that uses personalized lab testing, nutrition coaching, and lifestyle optimization to address metabolic health, hormonal balance, and disease prevention. The practice combines functional and conventional medicine approaches with support from a certified nutritionist.
highlights: Continuous Glucose Monitor (CGM) prescription with personalized app-based tracking and coaching
Advanced lab testing including Dutch hormone testing, stool analysis, and at-home panels measuring 50+ health metrics
Certified holistic nutritionist on staff for customized meal planning and recipes
targetAudience: People seeking functional medicine approaches to identify root causes of metabolic and hormonal concerns, including those interested in weight management and athletic performance optimization.
